metadata.note: Prefer short_desc; else clean long_desc; else build from parameters list.

candidate.description: Strip style/img tags and comments, replace   with spaces, then truncate to `dlugosc_opisu` and token-split to sentence end.
Build short description from visible parameters when descriptions missing or too short.

method.step: Else clean `long_desc` by removing tags/comments/styles/images, replace non-breaking spaces, then cut to sentence boundary or `dlugosc_opisu`.
Else concatenate `parameters/parameter` visible values into short description (limit `dlugosc_opisu_z_parametrow`).

parameter_template.example: Elegancka koszula męska z bawełny, slim fit.
